titleStmt.title: SII 22.559: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 559. (A.R. No. 559 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, AGASTYAKOṆḌA Agastyēśvara temple-On the base of the west wall Tribh. Vīrarājēndra-Chōḷadēva 14th year

summary.p: This records the consecration of the image of Saint Tiruunāvukkaraśudēvar in the temple of Tiruvagattīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār by Seyya Nambirāṭṭiyār, the wife of the chief Uttamaśōḻa-Gaṅgan alias Śelva-Gaṅga who receives the epithets Kuvaḷālapura-paramēśvara Gaṅgakulōttama, Kāvērīvallabha and Nandagirinātha. The inscription seems to be one of Kulōttuṅga III.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājentra- coḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭapuli nāṭṭut tiruvakatticcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku kuvalālapura parameśva
raṉ kaṅkakulottamaṉ kāverivallavaṉ nantakirinātaṉ Uttamacoḻak kaṅkarāṉa celva kaṅkar nampirāṭṭiyār jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa deventraciyarāyar pra yātavadevar tirumakaḷār ceyya nampirāṭṭiyār
Eḻuntaruḷun tevarkaḷil tirunāvukkaracu tevarai Eḻuntaruḷivittu tiru pratiṣṭaiyum paṇṇivittār .
Digital edition of SII 22.559 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
